findings.sql_guard_hard_blocked: Stored only in an individual ToolContext metadata mapping by GuardedRunSqlTool; no shared global hard-block flag found.
findings.original_question: Managed by a ContextVar in backend/query_context.py, set for a request and cleared after the message; forged incoming metadata is removed before insertion.
findings.last_user_message: Read from the current tool/request context; no cross-request store found.
findings.conversation_request_cache: Harness sends null IDs and the framework generates IDs per request. Runtime N1 IDs were not preserved, so this is a source-contract finding.
findings.sql_example_last_stats: Shared mutable diagnostic statistics are reset per retrieval, but are not injected into ToolContext or used to decide tool availability. They may make concurrent diagnostics racy; the N1 requests were sequential and no causal path was found.

evidence_scope: offline static code audit plus preserved aggregate artifacts
runtime_limitation: No N1 raw request IDs, histories, or LLM request bodies were preserved.
